long.description: 64-bit signed integer type for large whole numbers

decimal.description: 128-bit high-precision decimal type ideal for financial calculations

bool.description: Boolean type representing true or false logical values

string.description: Immutable sequence of UTF-16 characters with rich text manipulation methods

object.description: Ultimate base class of all types in the .NET type system

void.description: Indicates a method returns no value; cannot be used as a variable type

dynamic.description: Bypasses compile-time type checking, resolved at runtime via the DLR

var.description: Implicitly typed local variable, actual type inferred by the compiler from the initializer

Task.description: Represents an asynchronous operation that can be awaited

List<T>.description: Strongly typed dynamic array with indexed access and LINQ support

Dictionary<TKey,TValue>.description: Hash-based collection of key-value pairs with O(1) average lookup

IEnumerable<T>.description: Provides enumeration over a collection, foundation for LINQ queries

Nullable<T>.description: Value type wrapper that can also hold null, syntactic sugar T?

Span<T>.description: Type-safe memory slice over contiguous memory regions without allocation
